title: Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown Without the Gatekeepers
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, where PayPal is unavailable, or in countries like Ghana, Pakistan, and Bangladesh, where PayPal has strict restrictions, selling fonts online becomes a daunting task. The same applies to creators in other countries with similar restrictions, such as Venezuela, Iran, and Tanzania. You're forced to navigate the complexities of international payment processing, and your sales suffer as a result. In this post, we'll explore the options available to you, highlighting the flaws of PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip, and introducing a reliable alternative: Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, a frontend wallet integration that enables multi-chain QR code generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, including fonts. However, these platforms come with strict restrictions, making it difficult for creators in certain countries to use them. PayPal, for instance, has a list of countries where it's not allowed, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Bangladesh. Stripe has similar restrictions, while Gumroad and Payhip have more lenient policies but may still require verification. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect offers a flexible and secure payment solution that's available globally, without the need for verification or KYC.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip have strict restrictions in place to prevent money laundering and other illicit activities. While this may seem like a necessary measure, it effectively bars creators from using these platforms in certain countries. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't have any restrictions, making it an ideal solution for creators in restricted countries. This platform uses blockchain technology to facilitate secure and transparent transactions, eliminating the need for intermediaries and restrictive policies.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are often at odds with creators' interests. These platforms charge high fees, often ranging from 2.9% to 5%, and can take days to process payments. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect offers fast and secure transactions, with fees as low as 1%, and real-time payment processing. This means that creators can enjoy faster sales cycles, higher revenue, and improved cash flow.
PayPal's restrictions can mean lost sales for creators in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery are critical components of any digital product sales platform. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often lack robust automation features, requiring creators to manually process payments and deliver products. In contrast, Web3 Wallet Connect offers seamless automation, allowing creators to set up automatic payment processing and product delivery. This means that creators can focus on what they do best – creating and selling their digital products – while Web3 Wallet Connect handles the rest.
